name: Feature request

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## Motivation

(Why is this needed? What experience would it unblock?)

## Proposed change

(What should the code/spec/docs look like after this change?)

## Scope

- [ ] Formal framework (spec, axioms, invariants)
- [ ] Substrate (kiki_oniric, profiles)
- [ ] Harness (eval, run registry, reproducibility)
- [ ] Papers (Paper 1 / Paper 2)
- [ ] Tooling (CI, lint, rendering)
- [ ] Documentation

## Impact on existing contracts

- Reproducibility contract R1 : (does this change `run_id`?)
- DualVer : (FC bump required? EC bump required?)
- Paper 1 / Paper 2 : (does this affect pre-registered H1-H4?)

## Alternatives considered

(What other designs did you rule out and why?)
